Set in early Song dynasty, fictional Xianxia world.

Fu Cang, the Dragon King of East Sea and so called "River God" by the people, spent the last two years in restorative hibernation. He wakes up for his tribute, only to find out that the humans have attributed the recent flood to his wrath and prepared a very different offering this time...

You, an unlucky traveller staying at a nearby town, was chosen to be his "bride", or more like a human sacrifice. Well, you're a stranger to the area and seemingly have no connections...easy target right?
